account.paymentMethodsDescription: Configure Stripe, Djamo, CinetPay and Mobile Money.
account.creditDescription: Review your AI credits, balances and transactions.

account.teamMembersDescription: View and manage team members according to permissions.
account.referDescription: Share TeducAI with an institution or colleague.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Choose the payment method. Platform payments go to Thunderfam Group; school payments go to the institution account.
checkout.created: Payment created. You can follow its status in Invoices.

schoolLevels.subtitle: Central referential managed by the Super Admin; schools pick from it when creating classes.

classRoster.noStudents: No student enrolled in this class.

dashboard.title: Smart Transport
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of the fleet, drivers, routes and student assignments — a single source of data, integrated with billing and student records.

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.subtitle: Manage drivers, their licences and availability.
drivers.name: Name

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: Manage the fleet: buses, minibuses, vans and their capacity.
vehicles.name: Name

routes.title: Routes
routes.subtitle: Define routes, their driver, vehicle and the monthly fee (integrated with billing).

stops.title: Bus stops
stops.subtitle: Geolocated stops (GPS + ETA) along each route — the basis for real-time tracking and boarding attendance.

assignments.title: Student assignments
assignments.subtitle: Assign each student to a route — linked directly to student records (single source of data).
assignments.billingPrompt: Generate transport fees for the period (YYYY-MM):
assignments.billingResult: Fees generated: {generated} · skipped: {skipped}. Find them in Finance › Fees (category « transport »).

tracking.title: GPS tracking & safety
tracking.subtitle: Last known position of each vehicle and safety alerts (students not boarded this morning).
tracking.noAlerts: No alert — all assigned students have boarded.

boarding.title: Boarding
boarding.subtitle: Boarding/alighting check-in (manual, QR or RFID) — feeds the safety check and attendance.

fleetOps.title: Maintenance & fuel
fleetOps.subtitle: Safety/operational incidents and fuel consumption — feed the dashboard KPIs.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Salary configuration, payslip generation and payments.

subjects.title: Subjects
subjects.subtitle: Manage the school's subjects and curricula.
subjects.empty: No subject yet. Add your first subject.
subjects.confirmDeleteDesc: The subject « {name} » will be permanently deleted if no data protects it.

students.subtitle: Manage enrolments, records and student profiles.
students.empty: No student found. Add your first student.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Manage teachers, trainers and their assignments.
teachers.assignTitle: Assign an existing teacher to this establishment
teachers.assignDesc: A teacher already present in another establishment can teach here in parallel, without creating a duplicate.
teachers.empty: No teacher found. Add your first teacher.

leave.title: Leave
leave.subtitle: Request leave and track approvals.
leave.dateError: The end date precedes the start date.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Publish announcements to the school community.

teacherForm.addDesc: Register a new teacher in the system.
teacherForm.editDesc: Update the teacher's personal and professional details.
teacherForm.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
teacherForm.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

studentForm.addDesc: Enter the student's information to register them in the system.
studentForm.vPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
studentForm.notAuth: Not authenticated. Please log in first.
studentForm.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this student? This action cannot be undone.
studentForm.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

help.pageSubtitle: Detailed guide to using the app's sections, understanding the fields to fill in, validating forms and anticipating the expected result after each save.
help.searchPlaceholder: Search help, a field or a module…
help.modeHint: Choose how the Help button opens explanations from Dashboard pages.
help.modeDrawer: Open help in a side panel
help.s1Text: Hover the field to see the instructions and expected formats.
help.s2Text: Use exact, official and verifiable values.
help.s3Text: Required fields, formats and permissions are checked.
help.s4Text: Click Save to create or update the data.
help.s5Text: The data appears in lists, reports, documents, portals or notifications.

integrations.title: API & Integrations
integrations.subtitle: API keys for the partner REST API, and outbound webhooks for platform events.
integrations.apiKeysHint: Server-to-server access to the read-only partner API (/api/v1) via the X-API-Key header. The key is shown only once.
integrations.keyCreated: Key created — copy it now, it will not be shown again:
integrations.confirmRevoke: Revoke this key? Applications using it will stop working.
integrations.webhooksHint: Your endpoints receive platform events (e.g. announcement.published, leave.decided, payslip.paid). Leave the events field empty to receive everything.
integrations.noDeliveries: No delivery yet — deliveries appear when platform events fire.
integrations.name: Name

automations.title: Automations
automations.subtitle: One-click automation runs — safe to re-run (anti-spam built in) and schedulable via external cron.
automations.feeRemindersHint: Scans overdue fees and sends escalating reminders: gentle, then firm (after the level-2 threshold), then urgent with admin escalation (level 3). Parents with a phone on file also get a queued SMS.
automations.cronHint: To schedule it, call POST /automations/fee-reminders/run from an external cron with an admin token.
automations.parentDigestHint: Compiles each linked parent's weekly summary of their child (grades, absences, pending payments) in their language, with threshold alerts (low average, repeated absences).
automations.digestCronHint: Idempotent: a parent already served within the window is skipped. Schedule POST /automations/parent-digest/run weekly via an external cron.
automations.absenceFollowupHint: Auto-drafts and sends the parent message when a student is marked absent: notification in the parent's language + SMS when a phone is on file. Each absence is followed up only once.
automations.followupCronHint: Idempotent: an absence already followed up is skipped. Run after class or schedule POST /automations/absence-followup/run daily via an external cron.
automations.anomalyDigestHint: Detects the school's weak signals over the window: absence spike vs the previous period, unpaid ratio above the threshold, class-size imbalance. The brief is notified to the administrator.
automations.anomalyCooldown: A brief was already generated for this window — try again after the period ends.
automations.anomalyCronHint: One brief per window per school. Schedule POST /automations/anomaly-digest/run weekly via an external cron.
automations.rentreeHint: Rolls the academic year over in one flow: level→level student promotion (spread across the least-filled classes), leaver archiving (history kept), fee-schedule cloning onto the new year.
automations.rentreeNoPromotions: No promotion can be computed (check the classes' levels).
automations.rentreeConfirm: Run the rollover to {year}? Students will be promoted, leavers archived and fee schedules cloned. This action cannot be repeated for the same year.
automations.rentreeGuard: Guard rail: the same year cannot be rolled over twice (409 if the name already exists). Leavers' accounts stay active (portal and document access kept).
automations.homeworkRemindersHint: Spaced nudges (D-7, D-3, D-1) to students who have not yet submitted a published assignment. One reminder per bucket per student.
automations.homeworkCronHint: Idempotent per bucket: schedule POST /automations/homework-reminders/run daily via an external cron.

selfDocs.title: My documents
selfDocs.subtitle: Generate your administrative documents yourself: enrollment certificate, attendance attestation and payment receipts.
selfDocs.certificateHint: Proves the student's enrollment for the current academic year.
selfDocs.certificateBody: The undersigned head of school certifies that the student identified below is duly enrolled in our institution for the {year} academic year. This certificate is issued at the request of the interested party for all legal intents and purposes.
selfDocs.attestationHint: Attests that the student attends the institution.
selfDocs.attestationBody: The undersigned head of school attests that the student identified below regularly attends our institution for the {year} academic year. This attestation is issued at the request of the interested party for all legal intents and purposes.
selfDocs.receiptBody: This receipt confirms the payment described below, recorded in the institution's financial system.
selfDocs.receiptsHint: Generate a receipt for each of your confirmed payments.
selfDocs.historyHint: Each document carries a unique reference verifiable by the institution.
selfDocs.verifyHint: Authenticity verifiable with the institution using this reference.
selfDocs.signHint: The e-signature freezes the document content (any later modification is detected) and prints with a verifiable code.

studyPlan.title: My revision planner
studyPlan.subtitle: Built automatically from your real timetable, upcoming assessments and pending homework.
studyPlan.noAssessments: No assessment scheduled over the period.
studyPlan.noHomework: No pending homework — everything is in!
studyPlan.revisionHint: Spaced revision: overview at D-5, practice at D-2, final review the day before — duration grows as the assessment nears.
studyPlan.noSlots: No revision session to plan for now.

remediation.title: AI remediation
remediation.subtitle: After an assessment, generate personalized practice sets for each struggling student in one click — delivered straight to their notifications.
remediation.assessmentsHint: Pick an assessment: every student below the threshold receives a practice sheet tailored to their score. Re-running never creates duplicates.
remediation.subject: Subject
remediation.resultHint: {generated} sheet(s) generated, {skipped} already served, {above} student(s) above the threshold.
remediation.nothingToGenerate: Nothing to generate: every student is above the threshold or already served.

explainGrade.title: Explain my grade
explainGrade.subtitle: A personalized AI walk-through of each grade: where you sit in the class, what likely went well or not, and concrete tips to improve.
explainGrade.myGradesHint: Pick a grade and click Explain. The explanation uses your AI credits.
explainGrade.subject: Subject

sequenceBuilder.title: Sequence builder
sequenceBuilder.subtitle: Generate a whole term's lesson plan from the timetable's real weekly hours — every session pre-filled by the AI.
sequenceBuilder.parametersHint: Pick the class/subject (only pairs with timetable slots appear) and the term. The topic is optional.
sequenceBuilder.noTerms: No term on the current year.
sequenceBuilder.slotsInfo: {slots} slot(s) per week ({minutes} weekly minutes) from the timetable.
sequenceBuilder.creditsHint: Generation consumes your AI credits and the sequence is also kept in your notifications.
sequenceBuilder.resultStats: {slots} session(s)/week over {weeks} week(s) — about {sessions} sessions in total.

gradeOcr.title: Grade entry by photo
gradeOcr.subtitle: Photograph your handwritten mark list: the AI (OpenAI/Anthropic) transcribes the name–score pairs and maps them onto the class's real roster. Nothing is saved before your confirmation.
gradeOcr.scanHint: Pick the assessment then take (or upload) the photo. JPG, PNG, WebP — 8 MB max.
gradeOcr.providerHint: Requires an active vision AI provider (OpenAI or Anthropic, key configured in System → AI). Each scan consumes AI credits.
gradeOcr.reviewHint: Review every proposal before saving — scale /{max}, model: {model}.
gradeOcr.noProposals: No readable name–score pair could be mapped onto the class.
gradeOcr.missing: Students without a score on the photo

assignments.title: Homework & exercises
assignments.subtitle: Create, publish, grade and assess assignments — manually or with AI, online or on paper.
assignments.subject: Subject
assignments.aiReady: Questions and answer key generated — ready to save.
assignments.aiHint: The AI produces the questions AND the answer key (AI credits). You can adjust before publishing.
assignments.studentSubtitle: Your assignments to do, submitted and graded — with answer keys when available.
assignments.paperNote: This assignment is on paper: download it, complete it and hand it to your teacher.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: School fees, TeducAI plan, credits and payments — all in one place.
billing.roadmapNote: This view is on the roadmap. The underlying data already exists in TeducAI.

overview.creditDesc: Credits are automatically used for AI services and premium platform features.
overview.autoWarning: When your balance reaches 0, AI services will stop until new credits are added.

payments.title: Payment methods
payments.desc: Add and manage the cards and mobile-money accounts used for subscriptions and credits.
payments.secureNote: For your security, only the card brand, last 4 digits and expiry are stored — never the full number.

usage.title: Usage
usage.noData: No usage in this period yet.

credits.title: Buy credits
credits.desc: Top up your AI credit balance. Credits never expire unless stated.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.enterCode: Enter a coupon, promo, gift or referral code

reason.not_started: This code is not active yet.
reason.exhausted: This code has been fully redeemed.
reason.wrong_context: This code does not apply here.

assistant.subtitle: Ask about your bill, usage, invoices or plan — answered from your real billing data.
